education.school: KJ Somaiya College of Engineering, University of Mumbai

highlights: Built an AI agent that analyzes LLM usage logs using RAG over internal DLP rules, API policies, secrets dictionaries, and past incidents to detect sensitive-data leakage
Implemented vector-search retrieval to match logs against security policies and classify each event as Safe, Warning, Violation with LLM reasoning
Enabled automated incident handling using LLM tool-calling using APIs to open alerts and escalate high-risk leakage events, reducing manual security review workload

Designed and piloted AI-driven static and dynamic analysis models, leveraging supervised learning on vulnerability datasets to accelerate classification and triage. Improved detection accuracy by 25% and cut false positives significantly in large-scale financial application assessments

Applied machine learning techniques for anomaly detection in penetration testing pipelines, automating analysis of payment and online banking systems for a $16.81 billion financial client, surfacing 30+ high-risk vulnerabilities that would have been missed by manual testing alone

Developed a data-driven reporting methodology using predictive prioritization algorithms, which optimized remediation sequencing and reduced average vulnerability remediation time by 35%, ensuring compliance with SLAs
Applied machine learning models to real-time location system (RTLS) datasets, uncovering hidden patterns and improving prediction accuracy by 30%
Built an AI-driven anomaly detection system for high-volume network traffic, leveraging behavioural modelling to reduce data processing and analysis time by 40%
Optimized YOLOv3/v5 deep learning architectures for real-time RF signal analysis, improving detection performance by 50% on custom microwave datasets
Designed and trained signal classification models to enhance robustness and inference accuracy in noisy, high-throughput environments
Gained hands-on exposure to transformer manufacturing and assembly processes within the factory setting
Developed an understanding of the various departments and their roles in end-to-end transformer production
